mapper.sql: g.groupId, g.groupName, g.description, g.userId, g.state, g.createTime, g.updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_device_group_member m WHERE m.groupId = g.groupId) AS deviceCount FROM sys_device_group g WHERE 1 = 1 AND g.userId = #{userId} AND g.groupName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%') AND g.state = #{state} ORDER BY g.createTime DESC

SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_device_group_member m WHERE m.groupId = g.groupId) AS deviceCount FROM sys_device_group g WHERE 1 = 1 AND g.userId = #{userId} AND g.state = #{state} ORDER BY g.createTime DESC
SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_device_group_member m WHERE m.groupId = g.groupId) AS deviceCount FROM sys_device_group g WHERE g.groupId = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_device_group (groupName, description, userId, state) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{description}, #{userId}, #{state})
INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_device_group_member (groupId, deviceId) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{deviceId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_device_group_member WHERE groupId = #{groupId} AND deviceId = #{deviceId}
mapper.select: SELECT deviceId FROM sys_device_group_member WHERE groupId = #{groupId}

SELECT
FROM sys_device_group g INNER JOIN sys_device_group_member m ON g.groupId = m.groupId WHERE m.deviceId = #{deviceId} ORDER BY g.createTime DESC

SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_device_group_member m WHERE m.groupId = g.groupId) AS deviceCount FROM sys_device_group g WHERE g.userId = #{userId} AND g.groupName = #{groupName} AND g.state = '1' LIMIT 1
